title: Test dolt migration
description: Verify dolt backend and remote push work. Close immediately after testing.

value: bd doctor CGO: brew/curl installs are pure-Go, ~10 doctor checks (orphaned deps, dupes, stale molecules, etc.) show 'Skipped: requires CGO'. Core functionality unaffected. Fix: CGO_ENABLED=1 go install from source. For most workflows, ignore the warnings.

beads 0.61 migration: repos with prior Dolt journal corruption will fail UUID primary keys migration on upgrade. Fix: kill server, mv .beads/dolt aside, bd init --force, bd backup restore, bd backup fetch-git. Don't debug the migration — nuke and restore.

beads 0.61 sync: use bd backup export-git / fetch-git instead of bd dolt push/pull. Git backup pushes JSONL to beads-backup branch — fast, conflict-safe, zero config. Dolt remotes are legacy for single-dev workflows. bd prime --export still references bd dolt push (upstream hasn't updated).

CC Agent tool has native isolation: "worktree" for ephemeral parallel subagent isolation — creates worktrees under .claude/worktrees/, auto-cleans up. Use bd worktree create only for persistent feature branches needing beads integration and merge guardrails.

eslint-plugin-sonarjs cognitive-complexity rule uses plain number arg in v4+: ['error', 15], NOT object form. Also sonarjs.configs.recommended may flag branded type aliases — disable sonarjs/redundant-type-aliases if using branded types.
WebFetch cannot access reddit.com or Medium paywalled articles. Use WebSearch to find alternative sources (mirrors, GitHub links) when those URLs come up.

bd hooks install --shared writes to .beads-hooks/ (committed, team-wide). --beads writes to .beads/hooks/ (local only, gitignored). --chain preserves existing hooks. For team repos use --shared --chain. Pre-commit branch guard for beads-backup goes in the repo's own hook, not in .beads-hooks/.
